title: v0.4.1 — Public Channels, Identity Protection + MORE!
body:
Hi! Shout out to [rambros3d](https://github.com/VitalikPro13/HOLLOW/issues/9) for suggesting about implementing the Public Channels! It's fully working, automatic, and allows to easily read server channels simply from the server ID or join link. You don't need to even create an identity! Works inside the app and in [web version.](https://hollow.anonlisten.com/)

 The app has kind-of native screen capturing (finally), identity at-rest protection against someone stealing your files (you can even set a password to lock your identity!), and as some always say: 'Bug fixes and improvements' Well, it's true, so thanks for reading!

title: v0.4.0 — Native Capture, Mobile Port & Optimization
body:
Hello there! It's been a little while since the last update, but what a ride... I was basically fighting for 3 days straight with Windows screen capture audio because the quality was an abysmal trash. I tried literally everything but only one of the most craziest ideas actually helped - literally using our own .exe recorder that captures the audio packets, sends them all encrypted using the WebRTC data channel, and use the same .exe to play them back. AND LATENCY IS STILL AT MINIMUM!

 I will experiment with it even more for the screen capture itself, but this is a BIG day for Windows users! Including me:) MacOS will come soon, I still want to do some other stuff and hopefully that I'll make it happen. Bug fixes, optimizations etc. etc. You got the point.

title: v0.3.1 — Performance (again)
body:
This was supposed to be the proper v0.3, but this version focuses more on the performance optimization on the UI side (what you feel as a user) and backend. Lots of fixes, the app should feel faster now because apparently there were lots of bad practices like constant rebuildings of the UI when not needed.

 I wanted to focus on new features, but like... if the app works like ****, then what's the point of those features, right? No worries, all lessons from optimizations are learned, so I won't repeat them again! New stuff coming soon. Thanks!

title: v0.3.0 — Performance & Quality Overhaul
body: Over 60+ fixes across the entire app... my goodness. In short, tons of bugs and scailability issues + performance problems. Well, not it's fixed! The app keeps getting better every day, all for you! Full changelog [here.](https://anonlisten.com/hollow/releases/030_QA.txt)

title: v0.2.0 — Roles, Mentions & More
body:
Hey everybody! We're back once again with some good updates. Roles were completely reworked with some additional fixes. Also, apparently I forgot to add 'Leave server' option... well, v0.1.0 won't be available cause it's breaking changes, so yeah.

 Like, I think that we can work this way. If there are breaking changes, then better update and remove the ability to downgrade, but if it's non-breaking - then no need to. Alright, enough of my yapping. Enjoy the update!

 Release notes:

- **Roles & permissions system** — Owner/Admin/Moderator/Member power roles, permission editing gated by tier, leave server, bans

- **Labels** — cosmetic labels with profile card badges, self-service picker, stable ordering

- **@Mentions** — inline mention highlighting with autocomplete, notification badge support

- **Invisible status** — appear offline while staying connected

- **Twitch profile sync** — Twitch badge on DM profiles, sync fix on both DMs/servers

title: Hollow is now in public alpha!
body:
I'm so happy, you just can't believe it! If you want to know all the features, then check out the main overview video of the project on my [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qsXc-hJizsQ)

 Full End-to-End Encryption everywhere, file sharing, DMs and servers (also, the ability to allow only your Twitch followers to join one!), simple built-in auto-updater, so you can be up-to-date with all the latest features.

 I would love to hear your feedback, so please write to feedback@anonlisten.com or simply post your comments on my [TwitterX](https://x.com/Anon_Listen). Have fun!
